layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. IMAGE 2 is STYLE-ONLY: borrow palette, lighting, composition rhythm, background treatment and mood, but never copy its product, logo, trademark, text or distinctive props. The final image must feature only IMAGE 1's product. Product: 军事兵人玩具模型. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #FFFFFF, #F8F8F5, #C5A065, #4A4A4A, #2C2C2C, #E8DCC4; lighting: Soft, diffused high-key lighting; clean and bright aesthetic with minimal hard shadows, emphasizing a clinical yet luxurious feel.; composition: Centered horizontal arrangement of items on a tiered white pedestal; hierarchical text layout with large central headline, floating labels connected by lines, and a distinct bottom banner for calls to action.; background: Subtle, low-contrast texture resembling classical European architectural moldings or plaster reliefs in white/light gray, providing a sense of depth without distraction.; mood: Professional, elegant, trustworthy, clinical, premium, clean.; typography: Elegant serif typeface for main headlines in gold/bronze tones; clean, legible sans-serif for descriptive text in dark gray/black; bold, prominent numerals for pricing elements.; decorative_elements: Classical architectural relief patterns (faint background), Thin guide lines connecting floating labels to specific items, Small circular nodes at line endpoints, Rounded rectangular pill-shaped tags, Vertical capsule-shaped label on the left edge. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.
